daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are hitting different today. You're radiating that rare combo of curiosity and confidence—lean into conversations that make your brain light up. Trust the pull toward what feels authentic.
daily.love: Your heart's got something to say, but don't rush it. Whether you're single or coupled up, today rewards vulnerability over performance. Real connection happens when you stop trying so hard and just... exist.
daily.career: Ideas are flowing like crazy right now. This is your moment to pitch that thing you've been sitting on or propose a fresh take on what you're already doing. Your perspective is actually needed.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good—not punishing. A walk, a dance sesh, or literally anything that gets you out of your head lands different today. Rest isn't laziness; it's strategy.

weekly.overview: Your vibe is shifting toward authenticity this week, babe. The cosmos is basically asking you to drop the act and lean into what actually makes you feel alive. Expect some meaningful realizations.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or single, there's a cosmic nudge toward deeper conversations. If you've been holding back how you really feel, this is your sign to speak up. Vulnerability hits different rn.
weekly.career: Creative energy is flowing, and your ideas are actually hitting. This is the week to pitch that project or initiative you've been sitting on. Trust your instincts—they're surprisingly sharp right now.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement and fresh air. Whether it's a walk, dancing, or whatever gets you grounded, honor that call. Mental clarity comes easier when you're actually taking care of yourself.
